users.bio: Retired pastry chef. 40 years in commercial kitchens. Now I bake from home and teach anyone who wants to learn. My cookie cutters alone could fill a museum.

users.tagline: If it's broken, I can fix it
users.bio: Mechanic by trade, tinkerer by nature. Inherited my father's tool collection -- 500 tools, every one with a story. Now they're earning their keep instead of collecting dust.

users.tagline: The Black Wolf builds from the road
users.bio: Swiss-Canadian software developer building BorrowHood from a camper van in Sicily. If I can build a platform from a campsite with a Fairphone and a laptop, you can list your shovel.
Family camper business since the 90s. We rent, repair, and sell camper vans. Camping accessories for every adventure. Based at Palazzo Asia, Trapani.
Ho 72 anni e il mio giardino è la mia vita. Coltivo pomodori, basilico, e limoni. Posso insegnarti tutto quello che so -- ma devi portare i tuoi guanti!

users.tagline: Il legno ha un'anima. Io la libero.
users.bio: Master woodworker. 30 years shaping timber. My workshop is open to anyone who wants to learn -- or just needs a lathe for an afternoon. Bring wood, I bring the knowledge.

users.tagline: Fix it before you trash it
users.bio: Electronics repair nerd. I fix phones, laptops, and anything with a circuit board. Also have a 3D printer and laser cutter available for hourly rental. Right to repair is a human right.
Painter, potter, and part-time dreamer. My studio has a kiln, a wheel, and more brushes than I can count. I teach watercolor on Saturdays and pottery on Wednesdays. All levels welcome.

users.tagline: La nonna sa sempre cosa fare
users.bio: Ho 84 anni. Non uso il computer. Mio nipote Marco ha fatto questo profilo per me. Ma so fare la pasta migliore di Trapani e ho una macchina per la pasta che chiunque può usare.

users.tagline: Life's too short for bad gear
users.bio: Retired PE teacher. My garage has surfboards, bikes, camping gear, and more. Everything is maintained and ready to go. Hourly, daily, or weekly rentals. I deliver within 5km.
Professional cleaner for 15 years. I have industrial carpet cleaners, pressure washers, and steam cleaners that I rent out when I'm not using them. Save yourself EUR 200 -- rent mine for EUR 20.

items.name: Professional Cookie Cutter Set (200 pieces)
items.description: Commercial-grade stainless steel cookie cutters. Every shape you can imagine -- Christmas, Easter, animals, letters, numbers. 40 years of collecting. Ship & return available.

media.alt_text: Professional Cookie Cutter Set (200 pieces) - product photo

listings.notes: I'll include a recipe booklet with every rental. Ship & return within Italy.
I'll teach you how to make perfect cookies. 2-hour minimum session.

items.story: My mother started collecting these in 1982. Every Christmas, every Easter, every birthday -- she'd find a new shape. When she passed the collection to me, there were exactly 200 pieces. Each one has a memory attached to it.

items.name: KitchenAid Stand Mixer (Artisan 5qt)
items.description: Red KitchenAid Artisan. Perfect for bread dough, cake batter, whipped cream. Includes dough hook, flat beater, and wire whip. Heavy beast but does the job.

media.alt_text: KitchenAid Stand Mixer (Artisan 5qt) - product photo

items.name: Sally's Secret Cookie Recipe Collection
items.description: 40 years of recipes in one PDF. 85 recipes with photos, tips, and tricks. From simple sugar cookies to French macarons. Download instantly.

media.alt_text: Sally's Secret Cookie Recipe Collection - product photo

listings.notes: Instant PDF download. 85 recipes, 120 pages.

items.name: Bosch Professional Drill/Driver Set
items.description: Bosch GSR 18V-60 with 2 batteries, charger, and full bit set in L-BOXX case. 60Nm torque. Handles anything from IKEA furniture to hardwood decking.

media.alt_text: Bosch Professional Drill/Driver Set - product photo

items.name: Floor Jack + Jack Stands (3 ton)
items.description: Professional 3-ton hydraulic floor jack with matching jack stands. Perfect for brake jobs, oil changes, tire rotations. I'll show you how to use them safely.
items.needs_equipment: Flat, level surface. Never use on gravel.

media.alt_text: Floor Jack + Jack Stands (3 ton) - product photo

listings.notes: I'll do the job for you. Brake pads, oil change, tire rotation. You buy parts, I bring tools and labor.

items.name: Welding Machine (MIG 200A)
items.description: MIG welder, 200A, gas/gasless. Good for steel, stainless, aluminum with the right wire. NOT for beginners -- you need to know what you're doing or book a training session.
items.needs_equipment: Welding helmet, gloves, welding wire, gas bottle (if MIG)

media.alt_text: Welding Machine (MIG 200A) - product photo

listings.notes: Proof of welding experience required. Or book a training session first.
Intro to MIG welding. 3-hour session. You'll weld a small project by the end.

items.name: Camping Table + 4 Chairs Set
items.description: Tavolo da campeggio pieghevole con 4 sedie. Alluminio leggero, perfetto per la spiaggia o il camping. Si piega in una borsa da trasporto.

media.alt_text: Camping Table + 4 Chairs Set - product photo

items.name: Set completo attrezzi da giardino
items.description: Vanga, rastrello, zappa, cesoie, annaffiatoio, e guanti. Tutto quello che serve per iniziare un orto. Li uso da 30 anni e funzionano ancora perfettamente.

media.alt_text: Set completo attrezzi da giardino - product photo

items.name: Lezione di giardinaggio con Maria
items.description: Ti insegno a coltivare pomodori, basilico, e limoni nel tuo giardino. 50 anni di esperienza. Portiamo anche il pranzo -- cucino io!

media.alt_text: Lezione di giardinaggio con Maria - product photo

listings.notes: Minimo 2 ore. Pranzo incluso se restiamo più di 3 ore!

items.name: Accesso al tornio per legno (orario)
items.description: Il mio tornio professionale per la lavorazione del legno. Prenotazione oraria. Devi sapere cosa fai, oppure prenota prima una lezione. Il legno lo porti tu.

media.alt_text: Accesso al tornio per legno (orario) - product photo

listings.notes: Esperienza richiesta. Oppure prenota una lezione prima.
Lezione di tornitura del legno. 3 ore minimo. Fai il tuo primo progetto.

items.name: Sega circolare Makita
items.description: Sega circolare professionale Makita 190mm. Taglia legno massiccio fino a 66mm. Con guida parallela e lama di scorta.
items.needs_equipment: Occhiali protettivi, guanti, banco da lavoro

media.alt_text: Sega circolare Makita - product photo

items.name: 3D Printer (Creality Ender 3 V3)
items.description: Print anything you can model. PLA, PETG, TPU. 220x220x250mm build volume. I'll help you set up your first print. Bring your own filament or buy mine.

media.alt_text: 3D Printer (Creality Ender 3 V3) - product photo

listings.notes: Filament not included (I sell PLA at EUR 20/kg). I'll help calibrate your first print.
Send me your STL file, I'll quote you. Small prints from EUR 5, large from EUR 20.

items.name: Phone Screen Repair Service
items.description: Cracked screen? I fix iPhones, Samsungs, Pixels, and most Android phones. You buy the screen (I'll tell you which one), I do the labor. 30 minutes to 1 hour.

media.alt_text: Phone Screen Repair Service - product photo

listings.notes: Labor only. Screen cost varies by model (EUR 15-80). I'll tell you exactly which part to order.

items.name: Pottery Wheel Session (2 hours)
items.description: Use my pottery wheel and kiln. I'll teach beginners or leave you alone if you know what you're doing. Clay included. Your pieces fired and ready in 1 week.

media.alt_text: Pottery Wheel Session (2 hours) - product photo

listings.notes: 2-hour session. Clay included. Firing included. Take home your creation in 1 week.
2-hour guided pottery class. All materials included. Perfect for date nights!

items.name: Watercolor Painting Kit (Rental)
items.description: Professional Winsor & Newton watercolor set with brushes, paper pad, palette, and water cup. Everything you need for a day of painting. Great for plein air at the beach.

media.alt_text: Watercolor Painting Kit (Rental) - product photo

items.name: Macchina per la pasta (manuale)
items.description: La mia macchina per la pasta Imperia. Fa spaghetti, fettuccine, e lasagne. La uso dal 1975. Funziona ancora come il primo giorno.

media.alt_text: Macchina per la pasta (manuale) - product photo

listings.notes: Marco vi mostrerà come funziona. Portate la vostra farina e le uova.

items.name: Mountain Bike (Specialized Rockhopper)
items.description: Size L frame. 29" wheels. Well maintained, new brake pads. Perfect for the trails around Erice or a day exploring Trapani. Helmet included.
items.needs_equipment: Helmet included. Bring your own water bottle.

media.alt_text: Mountain Bike (Specialized Rockhopper) - product photo

listings.notes: I deliver within 5km of Trapani center. Helmet and lock included.

items.name: Surfboard (7'6" Funboard)
items.description: Great intermediate board. Stable enough for beginners, responsive enough for experienced riders. Includes leash and wax. Perfect for the beaches near San Vito Lo Capo.
items.needs_equipment: Wetsuit (I have one for rent too). Sunscreen.

media.alt_text: Surfboard (7'6" Funboard) - product photo

items.name: Industrial Carpet Cleaner
items.description: Professional Karcher carpet cleaner. Hot water extraction. Cleans carpets, upholstery, car seats. Does in 1 hour what a rented supermarket machine does in 4. Cleaning solution included.

media.alt_text: Industrial Carpet Cleaner - product photo

listings.notes: Cleaning solution included for first use. I'll show you how to use it -- 5 minutes.
I'll clean your carpets for you. Minimum 2 hours. You'll think they're new.

items.name: Pressure Washer (Karcher K5)
items.description: 145 bar pressure washer. Blasts driveways, patios, fences, cars. Comes with patio cleaner attachment and foam cannon. Water connection required.
items.needs_equipment: Garden hose connection, outdoor power outlet

media.alt_text: Pressure Washer (Karcher K5) - product photo

items.name: Cannoli Maker Kit (Sicilian Traditional)
items.description: Everything you need: stainless steel tubes (6), ricotta strainer, piping bag, and nonna's recipe card. Makes 24 cannoli per batch. The tubes are the real deal from Palermo.
items.needs_equipment: Oven, deep fryer or pot for frying

media.alt_text: Cannoli Maker Kit (Sicilian Traditional) - product photo

listings.notes: Pickup in Trapani centro. I'll show you how to use the tubes.
Full cannoli masterclass -- 3 hours, you take home what you make.

items.story: My nonna brought these tubes from Palermo in 1975. They're the real thing -- heavy gauge steel, hand-rolled. Every family gathering, the cannoli came out. Now it's my turn to keep the tradition alive.

items.name: Portable Solar Panel (200W Foldable)
items.description: EcoFlow 200W bifacial portable solar panel. Folds flat for transport. Compatible with most power stations. Perfect for camping, van life, or emergency backup. Includes carrying case.
items.needs_equipment: Power station or solar charge controller

media.alt_text: Portable Solar Panel (200W Foldable) - product photo

listings.notes: I'll deliver within Trapani province. Includes setup instructions.

items.name: Oil Painting Supplies (Complete Starter Kit)
items.description: Winsor & Newton oil paints (24 colours), brushes (15 assorted), palette, easel, canvas boards (5), turpentine, linseed oil, palette knife set. Everything a beginner or intermediate painter needs.

media.alt_text: Oil Painting Supplies (Complete Starter Kit) - product photo

listings.notes: Paints are partially used but all colours present. I'll include a colour mixing guide.

items.name: Pottery Wheel (Electric, Shimpo VL-Whisper)
items.description: Professional-grade Shimpo VL-Whisper pottery wheel. Whisper-quiet motor, variable speed, reversible. Includes bat pins and splash pan. Heavy (30kg) but I can help load.

media.alt_text: Pottery Wheel (Electric, Shimpo VL-Whisper) - product photo

listings.notes: Pickup only -- it's 30kg. I'll help you load it. Call before pickup.
2-hour pottery basics. You'll throw your first bowl. Clay included.

items.story: I saved for two years to buy this wheel. My first piece was so bad I almost gave up. Now I teach others. The wheel has made over 500 pieces -- each one better than the last.

items.name: 3D Printer (Prusa i3 MK3S+)
items.description: Prusa i3 MK3S+ FDM printer with MMU2S multi-material upgrade. Prints PLA, PETG, ABS, TPU. Build volume 250x210x210mm. Includes 3 spools of PLA and USB drive with test models.

media.alt_text: 3D Printer (Prusa i3 MK3S+) - product photo

listings.notes: Calibrated and ready to print. I'll do a test print with you at pickup.

items.name: 3D Printing Service (Custom Parts)
items.description: Send me your STL file, I'll print it. PLA, PETG, or ABS. Max size 250x210x210mm. Typical turnaround 1-3 days depending on complexity. Price per hour of print time.

media.alt_text: 3D Printing Service (Custom Parts) - product photo

listings.notes: Material cost included for standard PLA. Special materials (PETG, ABS, TPU) add EUR 2/hour.

items.name: Stand-Up Paddleboard (Inflatable 10'6")
items.description: Red Paddle Co Ride 10'6" inflatable SUP. Includes pump, adjustable paddle, ankle leash, backpack. Inflates in 5 minutes, fits in car boot. Perfect for the Trapani coast.

media.alt_text: Stand-Up Paddleboard (Inflatable 10'6") - product photo

listings.notes: I'll deliver to beaches within 15km of Trapani. Life jacket available on request.

items.name: Drone (DJI Mini 3 Pro)
items.description: DJI Mini 3 Pro with RC controller (built-in screen). 4K/60fps video, 48MP photos, obstacle avoidance. Under 249g so no licence needed in Italy. 3 batteries, carrying case, ND filter set.
items.needs_equipment: Smartphone for DJI Fly app (optional with RC controller)

media.alt_text: Drone (DJI Mini 3 Pro) - product photo

listings.notes: I'll do a 15-minute orientation at pickup. Must have ID for deposit. No flying near airports.

items.name: Greenhouse (Pop-up Walk-in, 3x2m)
items.description: Walk-in pop-up greenhouse, 3m x 2m x 2m. Steel frame, UV-resistant cover, roll-up door, 4 ventilation windows. Sets up in 30 minutes, no tools needed. Great for extending the growing season.

media.alt_text: Greenhouse (Pop-up Walk-in, 3x2m) - product photo

listings.notes: Seasonal rental preferred. I'll help with setup on delivery.

items.name: Carpet Cleaner (Bissell ProHeat 2X)
items.description: Bissell ProHeat 2X Revolution deep carpet cleaner. Hot water extraction, rotating brushes. Cleans carpets, upholstery, stairs. Includes cleaning solution (1 bottle per rental).

media.alt_text: Carpet Cleaner (Bissell ProHeat 2X) - product photo

listings.notes: Cleaning solution included. I'll show you how to fill and operate it.

items.name: Welder (MIG, Gasless 180A)
items.description: Gasless MIG welder, 180A. Welds steel up to 6mm. Includes welding mask, gloves, wire brush, 2 rolls of flux-core wire. Runs on standard 230V outlet.
items.needs_equipment: 230V outlet, ventilated workspace, safety gear (mask included)

media.alt_text: Welder (MIG, Gasless 180A) - product photo

listings.notes: Experience required. I'll ask about your welding background at pickup.
Beginner welding workshop. 3 hours. You'll learn basic joints and safety.

items.story: Bought this when I decided to build my own motorcycle frame. The frame never happened, but I learned to weld and now I fix everything -- gates, railings, furniture. Best impulse buy of my life.

items.name: Pasta Machine (Marcato Atlas 150 + Ravioli Set)
items.description: Marcato Atlas 150 pasta machine with motor attachment and ravioli tray. Makes spaghetti, fettuccine, lasagne sheets, and ravioli. Chrome-plated steel, Italian made. Clamp-mount for any table.
items.needs_equipment: Table with edge for clamp, flour, eggs

media.alt_text: Pasta Machine (Marcato Atlas 150 + Ravioli Set) - product photo

listings.notes: Motor attachment included -- no hand-cranking needed. Recipe booklet included.
Fresh pasta masterclass. 2 hours. Spaghetti, fettuccine, and ravioli. You eat what you make.

items.name: Banco da falegname -- uso orario
items.description: Postazione completa con banco da lavoro, morsa, aspiratore trucioli e illuminazione professionale. Accesso a sega circolare e levigatrice incluso. Portate il vostro legno e i vostri progetti. Devo vedervi lavorare prima di lasciarvi soli -- sicurezza prima di tutto.

media.alt_text: Woodworking bench with tools in professional workshop

listings.notes: Minimo 3 ore. Esperienza richiesta o lezione introduttiva obbligatoria (25 EUR). Portate DPI.
Giornata intera 8:00-18:00. Pranzo libero, c'è il bar a 50 metri.

items.name: Commercial Kitchen for Event Catering
items.description: Full commercial kitchen with 6-burner gas range, double oven, walk-in fridge, prep tables, and professional cookware. Perfect for catering prep, food truck staging, or cooking classes. Fully licensed for commercial food preparation. I'll show you where everything is and the hygiene rules.

media.alt_text: Professional commercial kitchen with stainless steel equipment

listings.notes: Minimum 4 hours. Leave it cleaner than you found it. Cleaning fee EUR 50 if kitchen not properly cleaned.
Full day 6:00-22:00. Includes gas, water, electricity. You bring ingredients, I provide the kitchen.

items.name: Garage Bay -- DIY Car Work
items.description: One full garage bay with hydraulic lift, air compressor, basic hand tools, and drop light. Oil drain pan and jack stands included. Perfect for oil changes, brake jobs, or suspension work. I'm next door if you get stuck -- 30 years under the hood, I've seen it all.

media.alt_text: Clean garage bay with hydraulic car lift

listings.notes: Minimum 2 hours. If you need my help, it's EUR 30/hr on top. Bring your own parts and fluids.
Full day access. I'll help with the lift. Clean up your mess -- oil spills = EUR 50 fee.

items.name: Orto in affitto -- 4x6 metri con acqua
items.description: Parcella di orto 4x6 metri con terreno già lavorato, irrigazione a goccia, e recinzione. Sole pieno dalla mattina fino alle 15:00. Perfetto per pomodori, zucchine, melanzane. Vi insegno io quando piantare e come curare -- 50 anni di esperienza non si buttano via.

media.alt_text: Sunny vegetable garden plot with irrigation

listings.notes: Minimo 3 mesi (una stagione). Acqua inclusa. Semi e piantine a carico vostro. Lezione gratuita il primo giorno.

items.name: Rooftop Terrace for Events -- Baglio Xiare
items.description: Private rooftop terrace overlooking the salt flats and Egadi Islands. 50 sqm, power outlets, string lights installed. Perfect for small events (up to 20 people), sunset aperitivo, photography shoots, or private dinners. The view alone is worth the trip. Tables and chairs for 12 included.

media.alt_text: Rooftop terrace with sea view at sunset

listings.notes: 4-hour block. Sunset slot (17:00-21:00) is EUR 75. You bring food/drinks. No amplified music after 22:00. Cleanup included.

items.name: Furgone con autista -- traslochi e trasporti
items.description: Fiat Ducato L3H2, 14 metri cubi di carico. Autista incluso (io, Nino). Perfetto per traslochi, consegne mobili, trasporto materiali da cantiere. Cinghie, coperte, carrello a mano inclusi. Conosco ogni via di Trapani e provincia -- niente GPS, solo esperienza.

media.alt_text: White cargo van Fiat Ducato ready for moving

listings.notes: Minimo 2 ore (EUR 70). Carburante incluso entro 30km. Oltre = EUR 0.50/km. Secondo uomo disponibile +EUR 20/ora. Sabato +20%.

items.name: Cargo Trailer Rental -- 750kg
items.description: Single-axle cargo trailer, 750kg capacity, no special license needed. 2.5m x 1.3m bed with fold-down sides. Includes ratchet straps, wheel chocks, and trailer lock. Tow ball is standard 50mm. I'll check your car's tow rating before I hand over the keys -- safety first.

media.alt_text: Cargo utility trailer with fold-down sides

listings.notes: Return clean. Mud = EUR 30 cleaning fee. Weekend rate EUR 50 (Fri evening to Mon morning). Insurance your responsibility.

items.name: Electric Cargo Bike -- Babboe City Mountain
items.description: Front-loading electric cargo bike with rain cover. Carries up to 100kg or 2 kids + groceries. Shimano mid-drive motor, 80km range. Perfect for market runs, beach gear, or kid transport in the centro storico where cars can't go. Includes lock, helmet, and rain cover.

media.alt_text: Electric cargo bike with front loading box

listings.notes: Full charge on pickup. Charger included for multi-day. Helmet mandatory. ID required. Weekly rate EUR 120.

items.name: Appliance Repair Service -- Washers, Dryers, Dishwashers
items.description: I fix washing machines, dryers, dishwashers, and ovens. 15 years experience with all major brands (Bosch, Samsung, LG, Whirlpool, Indesit). Diagnostic visit EUR 40 -- fully refunded if you hire me for the repair. Most repairs same-day. I bring my tools, you just need to be home.

media.alt_text: Technician repairing washing machine

listings.notes: EUR 40 diagnostic visit -- refunded if you hire me. Labor EUR 35/hour after diagnosis. Parts at cost + 10%. Most repairs EUR 80-150 total. No fix, no charge beyond diagnostic.

items.name: Restauro mobili antichi -- falegname esperto
items.description: Restauro professionale di mobili antichi e d'epoca. Riparazione strutturale, sostituzione impiallacciatura, lucidatura a gommalacca, trattamento tarli. 40 anni di esperienza. Mandate foto per un preventivo gratuito via WhatsApp. Per pezzi complessi, visita a domicilio EUR 50 (scalati dal lavoro).

media.alt_text: Craftsman restoring antique wooden furniture

listings.notes: Visita a domicilio EUR 50 (scalati se accettate il lavoro). Preventivo gratuito via foto WhatsApp. Ritiro e consegna disponibili entro Trapani (EUR 30). Tempi: 1-4 settimane a seconda del lavoro.
Restauri complessi: prezzo da concordare dopo la visita. Mandate foto del mobile + dettagli del danno.

items.name: Bike Tune-Up & Repair Service
items.description: Full bike tune-up: brakes, gears, chain, tires, cables, bearings. I work on road bikes, mountain bikes, city bikes, and e-bikes (non-motor parts). 10 years as a weekend mechanic. Drop off at my shed or I come to you (within Trapani). Most tune-ups done in 1-2 hours while you wait.

media.alt_text: Bike mechanic adjusting gears on a bicycle

listings.notes: Basic tune-up EUR 30 (brakes, gears, chain lube, tire pressure). Full overhaul EUR 60 (+ bearings, cables, deep clean). Parts extra at cost. Mobile service +EUR 10.

items.name: Plumbing Repair -- Leaks, Taps, Drains
items.description: Basic plumbing repairs: leaky taps, toilet flush mechanisms, blocked drains, pipe joints, washing machine connections. NOT a licensed plumber -- I'm a garage guy who's fixed his own house for 30 years. Simple stuff I can handle. Complex jobs I'll tell you straight: call a pro.

media.alt_text: Plumber fixing sink pipe under cabinet

listings.notes: Minimum 1 hour (EUR 25). Most tap/drain fixes done in under an hour. Parts at cost -- I'll show you the receipt. If it's beyond my skill, I tell you and you pay nothing. Honest work.

items.name: Riparazione impianto irrigazione giardino
items.description: Riparo e installo impianti di irrigazione a goccia e a sprinkler. Tubi rotti, gocciolatori intasati, programmatori, elettrovalvole. 30 anni di esperienza con giardini e orti. Mandate foto del problema e vi dico subito se posso aiutarvi. Lavoro solo su impianti esterni, non idraulica di casa.

media.alt_text: Garden irrigation system with drip lines

listings.notes: Minimo 2 ore (EUR 60). Materiali a parte. Sopralluogo gratuito se il lavoro viene fatto. Altrimenti EUR 20 per il viaggio.

items.name: Corso di saldatura base -- MIG e arco
items.description: Impara a saldare da zero. 35 anni di esperienza professionale. Il corso copre: sicurezza, preparazione materiale, saldatura MIG, saldatura ad arco, giunti di base. Tutto il materiale e le attrezzature incluse. Alla fine costruisci il tuo primo progetto da portare a casa.

media.alt_text: Welding training with sparks flying in workshop

listings.notes: Sessione di 4 ore. Massimo 2 studenti per sessione. DPI inclusi (maschera, guanti, grembiule). Portate solo scarpe chiuse. Sabato mattina o su appuntamento.

items.name: Photography Walk & Lesson -- Trapani Old Town
items.description: Learn photography while exploring Trapani's stunning old town. Composition, lighting, street photography, golden hour techniques. Bring your camera (phone is fine too). I'll teach you to see light the way artists do. We end at a cafe overlooking the sea. Small groups only -- 3 people max.

media.alt_text: Photographer teaching during golden hour in old town

listings.notes: 2.5 hours. Sunset walk preferred (16:30 start, winter) or morning (7:30, summer). Coffee at the end included. Rain date guaranteed -- Sicily rain doesn't last long.

items.name: Lezione di cucina siciliana -- pasta fresca e dolci
items.description: Vi insegno a fare la pasta fresca (busiate, cavatelli, ravioli) e i dolci siciliani (cannoli, cassata, frutta di Martorana). Ricette della nonna, niente scorciatoie. Cuciniamo insieme e poi mangiamo tutto. La mia cucina, i miei ingredienti, la vostra fame.

media.alt_text: Making fresh pasta by hand in Sicilian kitchen

listings.notes: 3 ore, pranzo incluso (mangiamo quello che cuciniamo). Massimo 4 persone. Ingredienti inclusi. Portate il grembiule o ve ne presto uno. Mercoledì e venerdì pomeriggio.

items.name: Electronics & Soldering Workshop for Beginners
items.description: Learn to solder, read schematics, and build your first circuit. We'll start with basic theory (15 min), then hands-on: through-hole soldering, desoldering, component identification. You leave with a working LED blinker circuit you built yourself. All materials included.

media.alt_text: Soldering iron on circuit board in electronics workshop

listings.notes: 2 hours. All tools and components included. Ages 12+ welcome (minors with parent). Max 3 students. Saturday afternoons at my bench.

items.name: Corso cura olivi e potatura -- 50 anni di esperienza
items.description: Vi insegno tutto sugli ulivi: potatura di formazione, potatura di produzione, trattamento della mosca olearia, raccolta, e spremitura. Lavoriamo nel mio oliveto (12 alberi). Teoria la mattina, pratica il pomeriggio. Portate guanti da lavoro e scarpe robuste.

media.alt_text: Olive trees in Mediterranean garden

listings.notes: Giornata intera (9:00-16:00). Pranzo incluso (cucino io). Massimo 4 persone. Stagione potatura: novembre-febbraio. Stagione raccolta: ottobre-novembre.

items.name: Mobili su misura in legno massello
items.description: Costruisco mobili su misura: librerie, tavoli, armadi, porte, scale. Solo legno massello (castagno, noce, frassino, ulivo). Niente truciolato, niente IKEA. Ogni pezzo è unico. Mandate misure e foto dello spazio, vi mando un preventivo dettagliato entro 48 ore.

media.alt_text: Custom handmade wooden bookshelf in workshop

listings.notes: Preventivo gratuito via foto/misure. Visita a domicilio EUR 50 (scalati dal lavoro se accettate). Tempi: 2-6 settimane. Acconto 40% alla conferma, saldo alla consegna. Garanzia 5 anni sulla struttura.

items.name: Commissioned Portrait Painting -- Oil on Canvas
items.description: Custom oil portrait from your photo. Realistic or impressionist style. Canvas sizes from 30x40cm to 100x80cm. I work from high-resolution photos -- send 3-5 from different angles. Each portrait takes 2-4 weeks. Perfect gift for anniversaries, memorials, or just because your dog deserves it.

media.alt_text: Artist painting portrait on canvas in studio

listings.notes: Starting at EUR 150 for 30x40cm. 50x70cm = EUR 280. 100x80cm = EUR 450. 50% deposit upfront. Revision round included. Shipping available (EU only). Dogs and cats cost the same as humans.

items.name: Custom 3D Printed Parts & Prototypes
items.description: Send me your STL file or describe what you need, and I'll print it. PLA, PETG, or TPU materials. Max build volume 220x220x250mm. Perfect for replacement parts, enclosures, brackets, prototypes, or that weird adapter nobody sells. I can also design the part if you send dimensions and sketches.

media.alt_text: 3D printer creating custom part

listings.notes: Starting EUR 5 for simple parts. Price based on material + print time. Design service EUR 15/hour if you need me to model it. Rush jobs (24h) +50%. Send STL for instant quote.

items.name: Progettazione giardino su misura
items.description: Disegno il vostro giardino dei sogni: piante mediterranee, irrigazione efficiente, spazi per mangiare all'aperto, orto produttivo. Lavoro con quello che avete -- non serve ricominciare da zero. Prima visita per capire il terreno, l'esposizione, e i vostri desideri. Poi un progetto su carta con lista piante e costi.

media.alt_text: Mediterranean garden design with stone paths and herbs

listings.notes: Visita + progetto completo EUR 80 (giardini fino a 100mq). Giardini grandi: da concordare. Realizzazione del giardino: preventivo separato dopo il progetto. Posso anche solo consigliarvi le piante giuste per EUR 30 (1 ora al telefono con foto).
Consulenza telefonica con foto: EUR 30/ora. Vi dico cosa piantare, quando, e come curarlo. Niente visite, solo consigli pratici.

items.name: Custom Sicilian Pastries for Events
items.description: Handmade Sicilian pastries for your event: cannoli (ricotta or pistachio), cassatelle, iris, frutta di Martorana, buccellato. Minimum order 20 pieces. Made fresh the morning of your event. Everything from scratch, no shortcuts -- real sheep's milk ricotta, hand-rolled shells, Bronte pistachios.

media.alt_text: Assortment of Sicilian cannoli and pastries on display

listings.notes: EUR 3.50 per piece (cannoli, cassatelle). Minimum 20 pieces = EUR 70. Frutta di Martorana EUR 5/piece. Order 3 days in advance. Pickup from my kitchen or delivery within Trapani EUR 10. Large orders (100+) = 10% discount.

items.name: Garden Maintenance & Cleanup -- The Full Day Crew
items.description: Two guys, shovels, wheelbarrow, hedge trimmer, leaf blower. We show up, we work, we clean up. Garden cleanup, hedge trimming, weed removal, basic landscaping, green waste hauling. No fancy quotes -- minimum EUR 200 covers 1 hour travel + 3 hours work for 2 workers. Need us longer? EUR 30/hour per worker after that. We bring the tools, you point at what needs doing.

media.alt_text: Garden workers with wheelbarrow doing yard cleanup

listings.notes: MINIMUM EUR 200 = 2 workers, 1hr travel + 3hrs work. Extra hours EUR 30/worker/hr. Green waste removal EUR 40/trailer load. We quote via photos first -- send pics of your garden via WhatsApp, we tell you how long it'll take. Consultation visit EUR 50 (refunded if you hire us). Don't waste our time and we won't waste yours.

items.name: Interior Painting Service -- Rooms & Apartments
items.description: Interior painting: walls, ceilings, doors, window frames. Prep work included (filling holes, sanding, masking). I bring drop cloths, rollers, brushes. You buy the paint (I'll tell you exactly what and how much). Clean lines, no drips, furniture moved and protected. 30 years of doing my own house -- time to do yours.

media.alt_text: Person painting interior wall with roller

listings.notes: EUR 150 per standard room (up to 15 sqm walls). Ceiling +EUR 50. Multiple rooms: 10% off after 3rd room. Full apartment quote via photos. Minimum job EUR 150. Paint NOT included -- I'll send you the shopping list. Weekend jobs +20%.

items.name: Servizio traslochi -- squadra da 2-3 persone
items.description: Traslochi locali a Trapani e provincia. Squadra di 2-3 persone con furgone, cinghie, coperte, carrello. Smontiamo mobili, li carichiamo, li trasportiamo, li rimontiamo. 10 anni di esperienza -- sappiamo come portare un armadio per le scale strette del centro storico senza graffiare niente.

media.alt_text: Moving team carrying furniture into van

listings.notes: MINIMO EUR 250 = 2 uomini + furgone, 4 ore (carico + trasporto + scarico). Terzo uomo +EUR 25/ora. Oltre le 4 ore: EUR 35/ora per uomo. Smontaggio/rimontaggio mobili incluso. Scala senza ascensore: +EUR 10/piano. Preventivo gratuito via foto degli ambienti.

items.name: Deep Cleaning Service -- Move-In/Move-Out
items.description: Professional deep cleaning for apartments and houses. Move-in, move-out, post-renovation, or just because it's been too long. Every surface: kitchen (oven, fridge inside), bathroom (grout, limescale), floors (mop + wax), windows, baseboards. I bring all products and equipment. You come back to a place that smells like new.

media.alt_text: Professional deep cleaning service in modern apartment

listings.notes: EUR 120 for apartment up to 60 sqm. EUR 180 up to 100 sqm. EUR 250 for full house. Products included. Windows +EUR 5 each. Post-renovation cleanup +30% (dust is evil). Keys or be home -- I need 4-6 hours uninterrupted.

items.name: Pressure Washing Service -- Patios, Driveways, Walls
items.description: High-pressure washing for patios, driveways, garden walls, pool surrounds, and exterior surfaces. Karcher K5 professional with surface cleaner attachment. Removes years of dirt, moss, algae, and black marks. The before-and-after will blow your mind. I bring the machine, you provide the water tap.

media.alt_text: Pressure washing stone patio clean

listings.notes: EUR 3 per square meter. Minimum job EUR 60 (20 sqm). Driveway average EUR 90-150. Send photos for exact quote. I need access to a water tap and power outlet. Best results on stone, concrete, tile. Not suitable for wood decking.

items.name: Handyman by the Hour -- General Home Repairs
items.description: Jack of all trades, master of getting things done. Shelf mounting, door repair, lock changes, curtain rails, TV wall mounts, furniture assembly, small electrical (light switches, outlets), minor plumbing. If it takes less than a day and doesn't need a licensed specialist, I can probably fix it.

media.alt_text: Handyman with toolbelt fixing shelves on wall

listings.notes: Minimum 2 hours (EUR 50). I bring basic tools. Specialized parts/materials at cost. List your jobs in advance so I bring the right tools -- one trip, multiple fixes, best value. Weekends: EUR 30/hour.

items.name: Kayak Tandem -- Explore the Coast
items.description: Sit-on-top tandem kayak (2 person). Stable, easy to paddle, great for exploring the coast between Trapani and San Vito. Includes 2 paddles, 2 life vests, dry bag, and a basic map of good spots. I'll meet you at the beach and show you how to launch.

media.alt_text: Tandem kayak on clear Mediterranean water

listings.notes: Full day rental. Pickup/return at Lido beach. Weekly rate EUR 150. I'll deliver to other beaches within 20km for EUR 15. Life vests mandatory -- non-negotiable.

items.name: Pottery Wheel Session -- Make Your Own
items.description: Hands-on pottery session on a professional electric wheel. I'll teach you centering, pulling, and shaping. You make 2-3 pieces (bowl, cup, vase) and I fire them in my kiln. Pick them up glazed and finished 2 weeks later. Great date activity, great rainy day activity, great any day activity.

media.alt_text: Hands shaping clay on pottery wheel

listings.notes: 2-hour session. Clay, glazing, and firing included. Max 2 people per session. Finished pieces ready in 2 weeks. Couples session EUR 70 (2 people). Wear clothes you don't mind getting dirty.

teams.invite_message: Marco gestisce il mio profilo. Senza di lui non sarei qui.
Luna photographs my baked goods for the listings. She makes them look even better than they taste.
